parameters-en.Drive: Controls the input sensitivity as well as the amount of gain and overdrive applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Bass: Controls the low frequency EQ of the overdrive.
parameters-en.Treble: Controls the high frequency EQ of the overdrive.
parameters-en.Presence: Adds upper harmonic content and increases attack.
parameters-en.Blend: Controls the blend between the tube amp emulation circuitry and the dry signal. The Bass and Treble knobs remain active, even when Blend is set to 0.0.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
